MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: D. Hakewill; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff John E. Wai, Trustee of the John E. Wai 1981 Trust is present. Represented by John Wai
Attorney Saul Ferster appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Verly B. Montejo Chan, Maria Orozco and Marisol Montejo are present.
Attorney Laura Slade Chiera representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Karnow, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 608, for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

This case settled, the trial date of OCT-17-2011 is vacated.
